title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 8th June 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Penny stock with perpetual debt-restructuring talk that never happens; only as a small dark-horse bet.
Good recent price action; resilient near 52-week high even on a weak day. Hold with trailing stop-loss.
Post-result price action after a long weak phase; hold with stop ~60, turnaround must continue.
Order book ~2,434 cr (~2x turnover, ~= market cap); upper circuit on May orders; emerging nuclear-power mid-cap, hold the story.
New listing never below listing price; emerging pharma growth story that rises steadily, buy on dips.
Good robotics theme but financials suspect, promoters selling, lower tops/bottoms; wait, don't buy now (hold if already in).
Chemicals; good March result but high expectations led to post-result correction; value here, don't book loss hastily.
Competes with the Ambanis in ports/shipbuilding; showed strength on recent news. Hold, no immediate fresh buying.
